name: solana_token_safety_check
description: Quick safety screening for any Solana SPL token. Returns: risk score (0-100), risk level (LOW/MODERATE/HIGH/CRITICAL/EXTREME), human-readable summary, token name/symbol, whether authorities are renounced, liquidity rating (DEEP/MODERATE/SHALLOW/NONE), top-10 holder concentration percentage, honeypot status (can_sell), token age, Token-2022 extension risks, and degradation status. This is a FREE lite check — for full details (individual authority addresses, holder breakdown with addresses, LP lock status and locker identity, honeypot sell tax, field-level change detection), use the x402 paid endpoint at GET /v1/check?mint=<address> ($0.008 USDC per request).

mint_address.description: Solana token mint address in base58 format
